summary: Market sentiment is BULLISH (Score: 60.0/100). Based on 10 news articles. More positive catalysts than negative.

news.title: Gold Prices Rally as Dollar Weakens
news.description: Gold futures pushed higher as the US dollar index fell to a three-week low, making the precious metal more affordable for foreign buyers.

news.title: Fed Rate Cut Expectations Support Gold
news.description: Market participants are increasingly pricing in Fed rate cuts for 2026, which typically supports gold as a non-yielding asset.

news.title: Gold Technical Analysis: Key Resistance at $5,000
news.description: Traders are watching the psychological $5,000 level as gold continues its upward momentum.
